escalation.rationale: US strikes on Iran's Kharg Island oil hub escalate conflict while Iran expands attacks to Gulf states including Dubai airport disruption.

ticker_items: US strikes Iran's critical Kharg Island oil export hub
Iran drone strike disrupts Dubai airport, flights suspended
Spain permanently withdraws ambassador from Israel
North Korea fires 10 ballistic missiles during US-ROK exercises
Strait of Hormuz blockade causes 90% drop in shipping traffic

eastern_europe.description: Russian missile and drone attacks killed six people including father of two in Brovary.

middle_east.description: Major US military strike on Iran's critical oil export hub Kharg Island.
Iranian drone strike near Dubai airport causes fire and temporary flight suspensions.
US-Israeli strikes on Isfahan kill 15 people in ongoing campaign.
Overnight strikes in southern Lebanon killed at least four people.

claimed_totals.figure: 1,444 dead in Iran, 15 in Israel, 13 US soldiers, 19 in Gulf states

middle_east.text: Türkiye will resist all kinds of provocations amid rising tensions in the Middle East
middle_east.speaker: Hakan Fidan
middle_east.title: Turkish Foreign Minister

middle_east.text: No military solution, only diplomacy for Lebanon
middle_east.speaker: António Guterres
middle_east.title: UN Secretary-General

observers.description: Spain permanently withdrew its ambassador from Israel and downgraded diplomatic relations over the Iran conflict. The diplomatic mission will now be led by a chargé d'affaires as tensions escalate.

Turkey's Foreign Minister vowed to resist provocations and maintain clear determination not to be dragged into the Middle East conflict. Ankara continues balancing regional relationships while avoiding direct involvement.

North Korea fired approximately 10 ballistic missiles toward the eastern sea as a show of force during US-South Korea joint military exercises. The timing suggests coordination with broader anti-US messaging.

financial.notes: Oil prices soaring due to Iran's effective closure of Strait of Hormuz with 90% drop in maritime traffic.

update_log.text: Iran drone strike disrupts Dubai airport operations with temporary flight suspensions
US conducts major strike on Iran's Kharg Island oil export facility
Spain permanently withdraws ambassador from Israel over Iran conflict
North Korea fires 10 ballistic missiles during US-South Korea exercises
Israeli overnight strikes in southern Lebanon kill at least four people
